title: NOAA Coral Reef Ecosystems
description: A source card for NOAA's coral reef ecosystem collection, lesson plans, data resources, and background readings.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA's coral reef ecosystem collection frames reefs as living habitats built by coral animals. Reefs support biodiversity, protect coastlines, provide food, and sustain coastal economies.
This source card can lead students to lessons on coral bleaching, remote sensing, deep-sea corals, virtual dives, reef restoration, and satellite monitoring.
The collection is useful for cause-and-effect reading: warmer oceans, acidification, pollution, and human activity interact with reef health in complex ways.
